comment: 65yo male with JAK2 V617F+ on peripheral-blood NGS and sustained polycythemia-vera-suggestive phenotype (elevated Hct 53% + low EPO + mild splenomegaly) but workup still in progress — bone marrow biopsy pending, currently NOT meeting full WHO 2022 PV criteria. Driver-positive pre-MPN-criteria phase. No confirmed AML or post-MPN MF. Note: a CONFIRMED DIS-PV patient would route to treatment-persona MPN algorithm per KSS §20.2; this case specifically validates the §20 prevention path for driver-positive patients in pre-criteria phase. Engine routes to PreventionPlan: standard = IND-MPN-SECONDARY-LEUKEMIA-PREVENTION-SURVEILLANCE (CBC + smear q3-6mo + bone marrow on cytopenia/blast emergence + JAK2 allele-burden monitoring); alternative = IND-MPN-SECONDARY-LEUKEMIA-PREVENTION-OBSERVATION (hematology-driven, BM only on cytopenia trigger). Validates v0.3 RF-MPN-SECONDARY-LEUKEMIA-PREVENTION pilot (secondary AML prevention).
